root_cause: blocking assignment used in sequential FSM logic
proposed_fix: module controller(input logic clk, input logic reset_n, input logic start, output logic done); typedef enum logic [1:0] {IDLE, BUSY, DONE} state_t; state_t state; always @(posedge clk) begin if (!reset_n) state <= IDLE; else if (state == IDLE && start) state <= BUSY; else if (state == BUSY) state <= DONE; end assign done = (state == DONE); endmodule

UVM_ERROR: FSM remained in IDLE after start asserted.
ASSERTION FAILED: expected state transition IDLE -> BUSY.
COVERAGE: 42.0
actions.output: UVM_ERROR: FSM remained in IDLE after start asserted.

root_cause: valid drops before ready in AXI-style handshake
proposed_fix: module axi_source(input logic clk, input logic reset_n, input logic ready, input logic [31:0] data_in, output logic valid, output logic [31:0] data); always @(posedge clk) begin if (!reset_n) begin valid <= 0; data <= '0; end else if (data_in != '0) begin valid <= 1; data <= data_in; end else if (!ready) begin valid <= valid && !ready; end end endmodule

actions.input: module axi_source(input logic clk, input logic reset_n, input logic ready, input logic [31:0] data_in, output logic valid, output logic [31:0] data); always @(posedge clk) begin if (!reset_n) begin valid <= 0; data <= '0; end else if (data_in != '0) begin valid <= 1; data <= data_in; end else if (!ready) begin valid = 0; end end endmodule
actions.output: {"log":"UVM_ERROR: VALID deasserted before READY handshake completed.\nASSERTION FAILED: valid must remain high until ready is asserted.\nCOVERAGE: 51.0","coverage":51.0,"pass_rate":0.6,"simulator_name":"mock","raw_artifacts":{}}

root_cause: UART FIFO write pointer increments while FIFO is full
proposed_fix: module uart_rx(input logic clk, input logic reset_n, input logic rx_valid, input logic fifo_full, output logic [7:0] wr_ptr); always @(posedge clk) begin if (!reset_n) wr_ptr <= '0; else if (rx_valid) if (!fifo_full) wr_ptr <= wr_ptr + 1; end endmodule

actions.input: module uart_rx(input logic clk, input logic reset_n, input logic rx_valid, input logic fifo_full, output logic [7:0] wr_ptr); always @(posedge clk) begin if (!reset_n) wr_ptr <= '0; else if (rx_valid) wr_ptr <= wr_ptr + 1; end endmodule
actions.output: {"log":"UVM_ERROR: FIFO write pointer advanced while fifo_full was asserted.\nASSERTION FAILED: wr_ptr must not increment on overflow.\nCOVERAGE: 47.5","coverage":47.5,"pass_rate":0.6,"simulator_name":"mock","raw_artifacts":{}}
